EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} failed to view information about the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to approve or deny a certificate signing request (CSR) received from the user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} denied a certificate signing request (CSR) received from the user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is approving a certificate signing request (CSR) received from the user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is denying a certificate signing request (CSR) received from the user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to create a certificate signing request (CSR) on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is creating the certificate signing request (CSR) "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} created the certificate signing request (CSR) "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} modified the object "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to modify the object "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is modifying the object "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the objects "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} approved a certificate signing request (CSR) received from the user {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
